validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters

confirmEmail.title: Check your email
confirmEmail.message: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account, then come back to log in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If {{email}} exists, a password reset link is on the way.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for your account
resetPassword.instructions: Choose a new password with at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.successMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This reset link is missing required recovery data. Request a new reset email and try again.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Use your current password to set a new one

profileSetup.title: Set up your profile
profileSetup.subtitle: Let others know who you are

logout.title: Sign Out
logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve — report a bug, suggest a feature, or just say hello.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe your suggestion, issue, or feedback...
feedback.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
feedback.successMessage: Thanks! Your feedback has been received.
